turnaround_reason: CNXC dropped from $62 to $22 (-64%) after the Webhelp acquisition inflated the balance sheet with $5.7B debt, causing margin compression and goodwill concerns. Q1 2026 showed a strong beat (EPS $2.61 vs $2.65 est, near consensus after Q4 2025 freefall) with management pivoting to AI-driven CX and GenAI services. Stock is basing near $27 with insider buying from CEO and CFO.
bullish_points: Forward PE of only 2.1x (likely GAAP-distorted by goodwill/amortization) and EV/Revenue of 0.71x — deeply cheap on revenue basis for a $10B revenue company
EV/EBITDA of 5.7x is value-territory for a tech services company with AI tailwinds
Q1 2026 earnings stabilized after Q4 2025 disaster — revenue holding at $2.5B/quarter with AI/CX wins highlighted on call
CEO Caldwell bought $37K and CFO Valentine bought $70K in open-market purchases at $27-28 range
Price/book of 0.59x — trading well below book value suggests deep undervaluation or balance sheet concerns priced in
bearish_points: Massive debt: $5.7B total debt, D/E of 204x — Webhelp acquisition levered the company to the hilt
GBL (Groupe Bruxelles Lambert) sold 6M shares at $22.25 in April 2026 — major sponsor exit is a negative signal
Net insider selling: -5.755M shares net in last 6 months driven by GBL exit
Profit margins TTM at -13.3% — currently unprofitable; turnaround requires operating leverage improvement
Basing pattern means direction uncertain — could break down below $22 if next earnings disappoint
catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings (June 29, 2026) — this is imminent. Guidance on debt paydown, margin recovery, and AI revenue traction will set direction
suggested_trade: Spot position with Jan 2027 $30 calls for upside leverage. Options have decent OI (1,112 calls, 2,371 puts). The June 29 earnings is a binary catalyst — size accordingly.
key_risk: GBL continues to exit and June 29 earnings miss or weak guidance on debt/margins sends stock below $22 support to new lows
would_skip_if: June 29 earnings miss badly; GBL announces further large block sales; management guides margins lower
